metadata.title: Rivers of Babylon (Single Version)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:21.39] By the rivers of Babylon
[00:25.32] There we sat down
[00:29.14] Yeah, yeah, we wept
[00:33.38] When we remembered Zion
[00:37.95] By the rivers of Babylon
[00:41.63] There we sat down
[00:45.53] Yeah, yeah, we wept
[00:50.18] When we remembered Zion
[00:54.75] Then the wicked carried us away in captivity
[00:59.45] Required from us a song
[01:03.57] Now how shall we sing the Lord song in a strange land?
[01:13.32] Then the wicked carried us away in captivity
[01:18.01] Requiring of us a song
[01:23.51] Now how shall we sing the Lord song in a strange land?
[01:33.51] 
[01:48.94] Let the words of our mouth
[01:53.06] And the meditation of our heart
[01:57.32] Be acceptable in thy sight, here tonight
[02:05.82] Let the words of our mouth
[02:09.63] And the meditation of our heart
[02:14.01] Be acceptable in thy sight, here tonight
[02:22.27] By the rivers of Babylon
[02:26.22] There we sat down
[02:30.43] Yeah, yeah, we wept
[02:33.33] When we remembered Zion

[02:42.55] There we sat down
[02:47.09] Yeah, yeah, we wept
[02:50.94] When we remembered Zion
[02:56.94] 
[03:13.39] By the rivers of Babylon (dark tears of Babylon)
[03:17.17] There we sat down (you got to sing a song)
[03:21.58] Yeah, yeah, we wept (sing a song of love)
[03:24.18] When we remembered Zion
[03:29.10] (Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah)
[03:30.43] By the rivers of Babylon (rough bits of Babylon)
[03:33.77] There we sat down (you hear the people cry)
[03:38.66] Yeah, yeah, we wept (they need their God)
[03:42.26] When we remember Zion (who have the pow-)
